title: CEO Log Cleanup
description: Housekeeping skill — prunes noisy/old rows from audit_log, llm_usage aggregates, old task_executions, and stale chat_messages based on configurable retention. Returns a deletion summary.
author: Jarvis Inc

commands.name: cleanup
commands.description: Delete rows older than the configured retention windows. Returns a markdown summary of how many rows were pruned per table.

parameters.name: audit_retention_days
parameters.description: Delete audit_log entries older than N days (severity=info only; warnings/errors preserved)

parameters.name: chat_retention_days
parameters.description: Delete chat_messages from closed conversations older than N days

parameters.name: task_retention_days
parameters.description: Delete task_executions that completed successfully older than N days

parameters.name: usage_retention_days
parameters.description: Delete individual llm_usage rows older than N days (daily aggregate rows preserved)

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.description: Report what would be deleted without deleting anything

returns.description: Markdown summary of deletions by table
